name: leftoff
description: Local-first memory and next-task guidance for unfinished developer work.

interface.shortDescription: Remember unfinished work and choose the next task.
interface.longDescription: Uses explicit local records and read-only Git metadata to reconstruct unfinished developer work and recommend a grounded next action.
defaultPrompt: What should I work on next?
Resume the work I left unfinished in this repository.
I have 45 minutes. What is the highest-impact task I can finish?
